scripts.dev: cd ../.. && bun run build:extensions && cd packages/app && bunx vite build && bun src/main.ts --dev
scripts.build: cd ../.. && bun run build:extensions && cd packages/app && bunite-build && bun run build:ptyd && bun run build:cli && bunx vite build
scripts.typecheck: bun x tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && bun x tsc -p src/renderer/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test:direct: bun test test/runtimeMode.test.ts test/webModeShellAuthority.test.ts test/webModeAuth.test.ts test/userAuthorityRegistry.test.ts test/pathGlob.test.ts test/serverConfig.test.ts test/appConfig.test.ts test/eventAclPath.test.ts test/cliShim.test.ts test/cliTokens.test.ts test/cliExtensions.test.ts test/localExtensions.test.ts test/paneRegistry.test.ts test/sessionStore.test.ts test/shellModel.test.ts test/browserPaneSpec.test.ts test/browserAgentOps.test.ts test/terminalPath.test.ts test/workspaceBus.test.ts test/workspaceContext.test.ts test/ptydBackend.test.ts test/ptydLaunch.test.ts
